Lyrics.text:
Moa ve Jeso fantatrao
Ny manjo ahy etỳ?
Moa ve mbola atsotranaoIlay sandrim-pitia,
Sa kosa efa nilaozanao
Ity mahantra ity?

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Efa sasatra, efa reraka
Mafy ny ady atao.
Efa trotraka, toa ho ketraka
Ka faingana Ianao.

Moa ve Jeso fantatrao;
Maro ny rafy etỳ?
Malemy ny mpanomponao
Sao tsy tody arỳ.
Tompo ô, omeo hery vao
Mba hitohy ny dia.

Fantatro fa mijaly ianao
Raha mbola etỳ
Nefa Izaho efa momba anao Ka herezo ny dia.
Kely sisa hiaretanao
Dia ho tody arỳ.
